Class TransactionJpaEntity

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.TransactionJpaEntity
@Entity public class TransactionJpaEntity extends Object
JPA entity adapter for the transactions table.

Transactions are append-only ledger records. Once committed to the database, they are never modified or deleted, providing a complete and auditable history of all fund movements in the system.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private BigDecimal
    amount
    The transfer amount stored as NUMERIC(19,4).
    private Instant
    createdAt
    The moment at which this transaction was recorded.
    private String
    currency
    ISO 4217 currency code of the transfer.
    private UUID
    destinationAccountId
    The account that was credited.
    private String
    failureReason
    Human-readable failure description; null for successful transactions.
    private UUID
    id
    Surrogate primary key; maps to the domain transaction id.
    private String
    idempotencyKey
    Caller-supplied idempotency key.
    private UUID
    sourceAccountId
    The account that was debited.
    private TransactionStatus
    status
    The transaction outcome.

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    TransactionJpaEntity()
    Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.
     
    TransactionJpaEntity(UUID id, String idempotencyKey, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, BigDecimal amount, String currency, TransactionStatus status, String failureReason, Instant createdAt)
    Full constructor used by the persistence adapter when mapping from the domain object.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private UUID id
      Surrogate primary key; maps to the domain transaction id.

    • idempotencyKey

      private String idempotencyKey
      Caller-supplied idempotency key. Indexed in the database for efficient duplicate-detection lookups.

    • sourceAccountId

      private UUID sourceAccountId
      The account that was debited.

    • destinationAccountId

      private UUID destinationAccountId
      The account that was credited.

    • amount

      private BigDecimal amount
      The transfer amount stored as NUMERIC(19,4).

    • currency

      private String currency
      ISO 4217 currency code of the transfer.

    • status

      private TransactionStatus status
      The transaction outcome.

    • failureReason

      private String failureReason
      Human-readable failure description; null for successful transactions.

    • createdAt

      private Instant createdAt
      The moment at which this transaction was recorded.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransactionJpaEntity

      protected TransactionJpaEntity()
      Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.

    • TransactionJpaEntity

      public TransactionJpaEntity(UUID id, String idempotencyKey, UUID sourceAccountId, UUID destinationAccountId, BigDecimal amount, String currency, TransactionStatus status, String failureReason, Instant createdAt)
      Full constructor used by the persistence adapter when mapping from the domain object.
      Parameters:
      id - the transaction UUID
      idempotencyKey - the caller-supplied idempotency key
      sourceAccountId - the debit account UUID
      destinationAccountId - the credit account UUID
      amount - the transfer amount
      currency - the ISO 4217 currency code
      status - the transaction outcome
      failureReason - the failure description, or null
      createdAt - the creation timestamp

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public UUID getId()
      Returns:
      the transaction UUID

      public String getIdempotencyKey()
      Returns:

      public UUID getDestinationAccountId()
      Returns:
      the destination account UUID

    • getAmount

      public BigDecimal getAmount()
      Returns:
      the transfer amount

    • getCurrency

      public String getCurrency()
      Returns:
      the ISO 4217 currency code

    • getStatus

      public TransactionStatus getStatus()
      Returns:
      the transaction status

    • getFailureReason

      public String getFailureReason()
      Returns:
      the failure reason, or null

    • getCreatedAt

      public Instant getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      the creation timestamp
